name: wilson-goal
description: Session goal persistence + re-injection — keep the high-level objective alive across a long session and context compaction. Goal lives on disk at <DATA>/goal.json (outside the transcript that gets compacted), restored at every SessionStart **and PostCompact** (the clean post-summary moment), and re-asserted as a short reminder on each UserPromptSubmit. A project-local `GOAL.md` (in the project root) is used as the default when no user goal is set. /wilson-goal set|status|show|clear|path. HONEST GAP vs wilson's `loop` plugin: only the goal-persistence half is portable — the autonomous-continuation half (wilson's loop_tick + QUEUE auto-injection) cannot be done from CC hooks (no `continue without user input` mechanism). Default ON. Opt out: SIDECAR_NO_GOAL=1.
